notes: Tunisia have no confirmed injuries or suspensions but are already eliminated, suffered a mid-tournament coaching change (Hervé Renard replacing Lamouchi), and carry severe morale/form issues after conceding 9 goals in 2 games; they have a full squad available but Renard may rotate freely.
